name: fin-2x
description: A marketplace of Claude Code skills built by the Fin 2x team.

plugins.name: skill-tools
plugins.description: Tools for authoring and reviewing Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: security-tools
plugins.description: Harden GitHub Actions workflows against supply-chain and injection attacks.

plugins.name: claude-code-tools
plugins.description: Meta-tools for running Claude Code well: audit your permission allowlist, fix local toolchain gaps, and analyze usage costs.

plugins.name: test-tools
plugins.description: Investigate and fix flaky tests across frameworks and CI systems.

plugins.name: code-review-tools
plugins.description: Strict structural and architectural code review that hunts for dramatic simplifications.

plugins.name: pr-tools
plugins.description: Open well-formed GitHub pull requests from Claude Code and attach screenshots and recordings to them.
